author: elias-shalom
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Agenda provide intuitive task management interfaces and calendar views. Seamlessly integrate with your existing notes while organizing tasks across multiple views.

manifest.description: Agenda provide intuitive task management interfaces and calendar views. Seamlessly integrate with your existing notes while organizing tasks across multiple views.
